wordplay_note: The gray everyman who sees ahead — a common man with uncommon foresight
card_description: Floyd Jones (meaning "Jones = common; Floyd = gray") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The World Jones Made*. Mutant precognitive who becomes a demagogue by predicting the future. Name note: The gray everyman who sees ahead — a common man with uncommon foresight. The prophet as fascist — foreknowledge as political weapon. First appears in *The World Jones Made*.

reference.brief: Mutant precognitive who becomes a demagogue by predicting the future
reference.significance: The prophet as fascist — foreknowledge as political weapon
